content.fallbackNotice: Not yet available in {language} — showing English.

home.heroTitleLead: A distributed inference network powered by
home.heroSubtitle: One OpenAI-compatible endpoint backed by GPUs that members bring to the network. Run an agent on your own hardware. Use the whole pool through one key.
home.needsNode: You haven't put a node on the network yet — finish setup
home.betaNote: GitHub sign-in · Free during beta · No credit card
home.consumerBody: Sign up, mint a token, point your client at {endpoint}. Every model on the network is one request away.
home.providerBody: Already running {vllm}, {llamacpp}, or {ollama}? Point the agent at it and you're a node on the network.
home.step1Body: Members run {agent} next to their local LLM server. The agent advertises whatever models the server is hosting.
home.step2Body: Each agent receives a short-lived Tailscale key and joins our private mesh. No public endpoints. No port forwarding. Just WireGuard.
home.step3Body: Calls to {endpoint} route to an online agent serving the requested model. Streaming works. Latency is direct.
home.feature1Body: Drop-in replacement. Swap the base URL and key — your existing SDKs and prompts just work.
home.feature2Body: Members serve open-weight models on their own hardware: Qwen, Llama, DeepSeek, Mistral, Gemma.
home.feature3Body: Requests reach providers over Tailscale, end-to-end encrypted. No public endpoints to scrape.
home.feature4Body: Pool compute with people you trust. Bring a node when you have spare cycles. Use the network when you need them.
home.ctaBody: Sign in with GitHub, mint a key, and you're live in under a minute. Bring a node whenever you have spare cycles.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in with GitHub to continue.
auth.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Guides, updates, and ideas on distributed, self-hosted LLM inference.
